holdings.infoBox: DIVB is an equity ETF with a total of 386 individual holdings. The top holdings are Automatic Data Processing stock at 4.81%, International Business Machines at 4.78%, Accenture at 3.65%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 2.73%, and Paychex at 2.35%.

overview.description: The iShares Core Dividend ETF (DIVB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Morningstar US Dividend and Buyback index. The fund tracks an index of all-cap US stocks that have a history of dividend payments and/or share buybacks. DIVB was launched on Nov 7, 2017 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Morningstar US Dividend and Buyback Index

data.title: Buybacks have been the biggest killer of stock prices, says Reynolds Strategy's Brian Reynolds
data.text: Brian Reynolds, chief market strategist at Reynolds Strategy, joins ‘The Exchange' to discuss his outlook on stock buybacks as big buyback names have been losing momentum lately.
